anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: This markdown maps receipt standard propagation to std_microcosm_receipt, the receipt doctrine kind, and standards-meta diagnostics because receipt-standard changes must be checked across generated corpora before they govern downstream support claims.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: This markdown maps receipt standard propagation to std_microcosm_receipt, the receipt doctrine kind, and standards-meta diagnostics because receipt-standard changes must be checked across generated corpora before they govern downstream support claims.

statement: Microcosm Receipt Refine Standard And Propagate
title: Microcosm Receipt Refine Standard And Propagate
triggers: A reusable receipt invariant belongs in std_microcosm_receipt rather than one receipt row.

Changing the receipt standard alters required payload fields, source-boundary semantics, omission receipts, validator refs, replay expectations, anti-claims, or authority ceilings across receipt artifacts.
workflow: Prove the invariant from live receipt payloads, validator outputs, governed standards, evidence artifacts, generated health, and relation registry before editing the receipt standard.
Update builder and validator logic so evidence refs, omissions, replay inputs, source coupling, and claim ceilings are computed or explicitly bounded rather than asserted.
Regenerate the lattice and keep unsupported release, private-equivalence, runtime, source-body, or whole-artifact completeness claims as residual pressure until source evidence resolves them.
